admissions_process.summary: ULS uses the official admissions office, application flow, and enrolment calendar for graduate applicants. The public pages show the process steps, but they do not expose a complete graduate-specific admissions manual in the inspected source set.
steps: Review the official program page and the graduate admissions pages.
Submit the application through the Office of Admissions and Orientation.
Complete the official document requirements referenced in the admissions flow.
Attend any required entrance exam or oral interview for the selected graduate program.
Register during the official enrolment period and academic calendar window.

required_documents.summary: The inspected official pages confirm that required documents are part of the graduate application flow, but they do not expose a complete public graduate checklist. No missing items were inferred.
notes: A detailed public graduate-specific checklist was not recovered in the official sources inspected.

language_requirements.summary: ULS publicly states the language of instruction or availability by faculty and, for some graduate programs, oral-interview and language-test expectations.
notes: Faculty of Law: programs available in English or French.
Faculty of Economics and Business Administration: programs available in English or French.
Faculty of Political Science and International Relations: programs available in English or French.
Faculty of Public Health: graduate programs available in French and English.
Faculty of Tourism and Hotel Management: programs available in English.
Faculty of Religious and Theological Sciences: programs available in Arabic.
Faculty of Religious and Theological Sciences graduate listing shows oral interview plus French or English or Italian.
No per-program language field was inferred where the official page did not explicitly publish one.

tuition_model.summary: ULS publishes faculty-level graduate tuition for the 2025-2026 academic year. Tuition is best represented as a shared faculty schedule rather than as program-level fields, because the public pages expose faculty pricing and some program pages do not restate the fee figure.
notes: Program-level tuition remains null in `programs.json` because shared tuition is centralized here.
The MIAGE double master did not have a separately recovered stable numeric tuition figure in the inspected source set.

tuition_table.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists graduate tuition for the Faculty of Law as $300 per credit.

application_fee.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists a $50 application fee across the graduate fee table.

registration_fees.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists a $300 + 7,000,000 LBP graduate registration fee.

Official tuition-fees page lists a $300 + 7,000,000 LBP graduate registration fee.

registration_fees.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists a $40 + 1,000,000 LBP graduate registration fee.

support_services_fee.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists support services at $120 for most graduate faculties.

down_payment.notes: Official tuition-fees page lists a $330 down payment for most graduate faculties.

fee_structure.notes: The official tuition page also publishes faculty-specific variations and a faculty-specific support-services fee for Religious and Theological Sciences.

payment_methods.summary: The reviewed official pages do not publish a detailed graduate payment-method matrix. Fee handling is presented through the admissions and tuition-fees pages, with the registrar and admissions office as the official entry points.
items: Use the official admissions and tuition-fees pages for graduate fee handling
Use the Office of Admissions and Orientation for graduate applicant routing
Use the Office of the Registrar for registration-related fee processing

payment_plans.summary: No formal graduate installment plan was recovered from the inspected official pages.
items: No published graduate installment schedule was recovered

scholarships.summary: ULS publishes scholarship and merit-based support options on its financial-support page.
items: Prodigy Achievement Scholarship
Academic Distinction Scholarship
Presidential Scholarship
Third Party Scholarship

financial_aid.summary: ULS publishes financial support beyond scholarships, including sibling aid, student work, and La Sagesse network support.
items: Siblings Aid
Student Work
La Sagesse Schools support
La Sagesse Network Protocol support

academic_calendar.summary: ULS publishes an official 2025-2026 academic calendar PDF and enrolment timing page.
items: Official 2025-2026 academic calendar PDF
Enrolment calendar and exam dates page
Registrar academic calendar services

graduate_regulations.summary: The registrar page confirms academic-catalog and registration services. The DBA brochure is the clearest public graduate-regulations document recovered in this pass.
items: Office of the Registrar academic catalog services
DBA brochure / academic regulations PDF
Graduate program pages linking academic-plan resources

international_students.summary: No dedicated graduate international-student policy page was recovered. The official site instead exposes admissions, international academic partnerships, and faculty pages that mention collaborations.
items: Admissions office handles graduate applicant routing
FEBA international page confirms the MIAGE double master with Université de Bordeaux
DBA page and brochure confirm the ISC Paris partnership
No separate graduate international-student policy text was recovered

accreditation.summary: The official Academics page publishes faculty-level accreditation or certification statements for some graduate faculties. No broader university-wide graduate accreditation catalogue was recovered.
items: Faculty of Law accredited by FIBAA
Faculty of Economics and Business Administration accredited by FIBAA
Faculty of Tourism and Hotel Management has Academic Certification of École Hôtelière de Lausanne
notes: The Public Health page also mentions Hcéres accreditation, but that statement is for the undergraduate Nursing program and was not used as a graduate accreditation item.
